name: narrativeguard-hook
description: NarrativeGuard Hook: narrative-driven Uniswap v4 meme trading protection for X Layer.

scripts.auto:xlayer-mainnet-demo: DEPLOY_DEMO_TOKENS=true CONFIGURE_DEMO_POOL=true INITIALIZE_V4_POOL=true npm run deploy:xlayer-mainnet
scripts.frontend:dev: npm run compile && npm run export:frontend-artifacts && npm --prefix frontend run dev
scripts.frontend:build: npm run export:frontend-artifacts && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.check: npm run compile && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run frontend:build
